w:r.w:t: KEVDA BIOWORKS
| Website QA Report — Fix List
Date: March 16, 2026 | Site: kevda-website.vercel.app | Total checks: 240 | Pass: 194 | Fail: 28 | Flag: 18

Hi — we ran a full automated QA test on the Kevda website using a real browser. The test visited every page, clicked every button, checked all the copy, and tested the contact form. Below is everything that needs to be fixed. Please work through each item in order, starting with Section 1. Once everything is done, let us know and we will run the test again to confirm.
Total Checks
Passed
Failed
Needs Review
SECTION 1 — Critical Fixes
Please fix these first. These are broken and affect real visitors.
All 4 service pages
These pages are returning a 404 error — visitors cannot open them.

The pages exist but are not accessible. Please make sure each of these URLs works correctly when someone visits them directly: /capabilities/molecular-biology /capabilities/cell-engineering /capabilities/protein-characterization /capabilities/rna-delivery
All pages — secondary buttons
Several buttons across the site do nothing when clicked.

The following buttons have no destination. Please add the correct link to each one: "Explore Capabilities" → link to /capabilities "Request a Scope Proposal" → link to /contact "Request a Quality Overview" → link to /contact "Initiate a Project" → link to /contact "Contact Recruiting" → link to /contact "Learn About Kevda" → link to /about "Discuss a Molecular Biology Scope" → link to /contact "Talk to a Scientist" → link to /contact "Discuss Protein Characterization Support" → link to /contact "Discuss an mRNA/LNP Scope" → link to /contact
Capabilities page — H1 heading
There is a missing space in the main heading.
The heading currently reads: "Execution built forpreclinical pace." Please change it to: "Execution built for preclinical pace."
About page — founder names
The names Aaron Larsen and Joel Deutsch are not showing as real text on the page.
The names appear to be inside an image, not as actual text. Please make sure both names appear as real readable text on the page — not embedded in a graphic.
About page — duplicate portrait photo
The same portrait photo is appearing more than once.
There is a duplicate image — the same photo is used more than once on the page. Please remove the duplicate. Each founder should have exactly one photo.
Contact page — Service Interest dropdown
The Service Interest dropdown is empty — it has no options inside it.
Please add these four options to the dropdown: - Molecular Biology - Cell Engineering - Protein Characterization - RNA & Delivery
Contact page — confirmation message
After someone submits the form, nothing happens — no confirmation is shown.
Please show a confirmation message after a successful form submission. The message should say: "You'll receive a follow-up with scope-alignment questions and recommended next steps."
Careers page — missing button
"Learn About Kevda" button is missing from the Careers page.
Please add a button with the text "Learn About Kevda" and link it to /about.
Privacy Policy page
The Privacy Policy page returns a 404 error — it cannot be opened.
The footer links to it but the page does not load. Please fix the routing so /privacy opens correctly.
Terms of Use page
The Terms of Use page returns a 404 error — it cannot be opened.
The footer links to it but the page does not load. Please fix the routing so /terms opens correctly.
Footer — all pages
The email address info@kevdabioworks.com is visible in plain text in the footer on every page.
Please remove the email address from the footer completely. Do not display any email address anywhere in the footer. All contact should go through the contact form.
SECTION 2 — Technical Fixes
These are code and settings changes — required before moving to the real domain.
All pages — page titles
Every page on the site currently has the exact same title in the browser tab.

Each page needs its own unique title. Please update the <title> tag for each page as follows:
Home → Kevda Bioworks | Integrated mRNA Development & Preclinical Execution Capabilities → Kevda Bioworks | Capabilities Molecular Biology → Kevda Bioworks | Molecular Biology & Vector Engineering Cell Engineering → Kevda Bioworks | Cell Engineering & Functional Analysis Protein Characterization → Kevda Bioworks | Protein Characterization & Immunoassays RNA & Delivery → Kevda Bioworks | Specialized RNA & Advanced Delivery About → Kevda Bioworks | About Quality → Kevda Bioworks | Quality Security → Kevda Bioworks | Security & Confidentiality Leadership → Kevda Bioworks | Leadership Careers → Kevda Bioworks | Careers Contact → Kevda Bioworks | Contact Privacy Policy → Kevda Bioworks | Privacy Policy Terms of Use → Kevda Bioworks | Terms of Use
robots.txt
The file /robots.txt does not exist on the site.
Please add a robots.txt file to the root of the site. It should allow all search engine crawlers. Without this file, there may be SEO problems.
sitemap.xml
The file /sitemap.xml does not exist on the site.
Please add a sitemap.xml file to the root of the site and list all 14 live pages. This helps Google find and index all pages correctly.
All pages — OpenGraph tags
The site is missing OpenGraph meta tags. When someone shares a Kevda page on LinkedIn or WhatsApp, it will show a blank card with no image and no description.

Please add these three meta tags to the <head> section of every page:
og:title — use the unique page title from Fix #12 above og:description — use the page subheading og:image — use the Kevda logo or a clean brand image
Without these, social sharing will look unprofessional.
WHAT IS WORKING WELL — No action needed on these items
The following items all passed and do not need any changes:
All main pages load correctly — Home, Capabilities, About, Quality, Security, Leadership, Careers, Contact
Zero JavaScript errors across the entire site
No broken images on any page
No typos found — the word "recieve" does not appear anywhere
No mention of "Cambridge" anywhere on the site
No stock photos detected
No out-of-scope claims (GMP, clinical, in vivo) — all clean
"Start a Confidential Discussion" primary CTA works correctly everywhere it appears
Footer location is correct on all pages: Boston, MA | Bangalore, India
Blog page is correctly not live, and no Blog link appears in the nav
Custom 404 page works correctly
HTTPS is working — HTTP redirects to HTTPS correctly
NDA checkbox on the contact form is optional (correct)
Mobile: no horizontal scroll, hamburger menu is accessible
Privacy Policy and Terms of Use pages have all required sections
No placeholder text or developer test strings found anywhere
No Delaware registered address exposed on any public page
Favicon is present
Next step:
Please complete all items in Section 1 first, then Section 2. Once everything is done, please reply to confirm and we will re-run the full QA test to verify all fixes.
Thank you.
